textByHash.3489f1527f67a19671a477d1626c571cfd029c13: Ah, I know the ceremony very well. Maybe I can help. I do have a cape, but why would I want to give it to some random person off the streets?
textByHash.a9017cd093a231c7703801fead9807f40bd1a5ab: Nice try. But I am always glad to help a person in need, if they can demonstrate some insight.
textByHash.63b108bdc1342cc58565eab9a59e1a70a1a35656: How about you try and guess my name!
textByHash.a0ce5107477a8ce31cc60a273be52ea7babdecf7: Ah, you'd think so, but no. That is my alias. I want you to tell me my REAL name! I have one first name, and a triple barrel surname!
textByHash.723c3636f1a6d53f4e1e655d66aa034145f22491: OK. Change a letter from the word Dane to get my first name. The first part of my surname rhymes with wood, the third part rhymes with spade and the second rhymes with magic.
textByHash.fc4241cf8a23a8c8a61870a847d1bb74a1298647: It's not my fault my parents had an over active imagination.
textByHash.b017672f6635c9b03512a8eaa7414584734911f5: Do you want this cape or not?
textByHash.34b03ab7fd9b53f3a43731234782704b5eb5fdba: I don't like to repeat myself, but...
textByHash.708f74ac0b988e4fd99ac61de78cd374d75e6d89: Ah, a stranger to our island. What brings you here?
textByHash.cca8d6b7dcb0f5210858f3762f960be5e6ffa384: The Fremenniks? Pah! They are just too ignorant and stubborn to listen to anything we have to say - how can we possibly associate with a race that won't listen?
textByHash.3a82aaa62f405aa64cc1928ac70165ff70ef37bd: Well, when the day comes that a Fremennik can prove they have the patience and interest in learning our ways, then we will perhaps share our secrets.
textByHash.f29155a3848227d96ba6d61a0bedf4ce526d3790: Good luck. It's far from simple.
textByHash.05514826ffc8a085e0cfcab235c05ed1c056c9af: The Rremenniks? Pah! They are just too ignorant and stubborn to listen to anything we have to say - how can we possibly associate with a race that won't listen?
textByHash.d58bc9585284b93a57621d7c06e266c6d2f93de8: Ah, I know the ceremony very well. Maybe I can help. I do have a cape, but why would I want to give it so some random person off the streets?
